subcodes.first_line: To the esteemed trustee, the letter dispatched from Baku hath been received, as well as the letter dated the 9th of Rabi' al-Thani [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب امین نامه مرسل از بادکوبه رسید و همچنین نامه ای که بتاریخ ۹ ربیع الثانی
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @praise and encouragement
